text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka first showed her extraordinary
runaway style to the world at her debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But, paying no mind to the popularity she's
gained since then, she trains today looking as
calm as ever.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Phew... I've finished cooling down.
choice_data_list: That should do it for today then.
That should do it for today then.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Understood.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You're looking good, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh! Air Groove. Are you training right now too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Air Groove, the "Empress." She's the very
paradigm of a proud and dignified racer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm training. But more importantly...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I watched your debut the other day. It was quite
the display.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You looked completely at ease on the track. I
don't think I've ever seen you run like that. It was
almost a little scary.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
At the same time, I think running unrestrained like
that suits you best.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I've realized that I don't have to think
so much when I'm running.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I just need to keep running forward... until I've
reached the place where I want to go.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh. You're a special one, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
However, you should know, the Twinkle Series
isn't quite that simple. You've got a difficult road
ahead.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Every single one of your opponents will do
anything that it takes to win. Don't forget that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. Her success depends on your efforts as
well. I hope you won't waste her talents.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Not a bad response. Well then, I'll take my
leave.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: See you later, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right. It's up to me to lead Silence Suzuka to
success in the Twinkle Series. I'll make sure that
happens!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, inside the noisy dorm cafeteria,
Silence Suzuka quietly eats alone.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...This looks tasty.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, look. It's Silence Suzuka. I heard she's a
really good racer.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
She's kinda aloof though. I get nervous trying to
strike up a conversation with her...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Spe. What's up?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I've got some big news for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Special Week's arrival, the party of one
quickly becomes a party of fun.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So, today I was walking through the shopping
district, and guess what I saw playing on a TV? It
was your debut race!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're always amazing, of course, but during an
actual race, you just...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sparkle! Seriously, I was completely floored!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka begins to laugh. She's a sight
different from moments before, when she was
eating quietly by herself.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Oh, Spe...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna be on TV a lot more, now that
you've started the Twinkle Series, right? I can't
wait!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That reminds me! I bought these strawberry
mochi while I was there in the shopping district! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wanna eat 'em together later?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sounds good. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? D-did I say something funny?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, no, no. You're just always so full of energy,
Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I like that about you. Can we have the strawberry
mochi once I finish eating?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: They continue chatting together for a time.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Special Week is kind of amazing...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Right? It's like she's got both great and terrible
communication skills at the same time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little do they know how much attention is
currently focused on them.
